title: elatostema procridifolium
intro: Elatostema procridifolium is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family Urticaceae, native to China. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elatostema procridifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations. Traditional herbal preparations of Elatostema procridifolium include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used in Chinese traditional medicine.
